category_sources: Official libxkbcommon documentation describes it as implementing the XKB specification for parsing keyboard descriptions and handling keyboard state.
source_facts.description says libxkbcommon is a keyboard handling library.
display_name_sources: Official documentation uses libxkbcommon as the project name.
docs_sources: Official libxkbcommon site provides current documentation at xkbcommon.org/doc/current.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/xkbcommon/libxkbcommon; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official documentation mentions XKB, Wayland, X11, keyboard state, and CLI tools.
